name: stratagraph-skills
description: Project-agnostic skills for finding, posting, and feeding knowledge in Stratagraph

plugins.name: stratagraph
plugins.description: Skills for using a Stratagraph knowledge project over MCP: find (verified lookup), post (general document intake), import (interactive cold-start), and gather (daily cloud routine). Requires your Stratagraph project's MCP server connected, e.g. https://stratagraph.io/api/mcp/YOURPROJECT

interface.shortDescription: Find, post, import, and gather knowledge
interface.longDescription: Use focused skills to find verified answers, post source material, import existing knowledge, and gather daily activity in Stratagraph.
defaultPrompt: Find a verified answer in my Stratagraph project.
Post this source material to Stratagraph.
Import this source collection into a new Stratagraph project.
